message:
fix(ftui-core): move tracing deps to platform-independent section for WASM (bd-lff4p.12.2)

The tracing and tracing-subscriber optional dependencies were placed
under [target.'cfg(unix)'.dependencies], making them unavailable on
wasm32-unknown-unknown. Move them to [dependencies] so ftui-core
compiles on WASM with --features tracing and --features tracing-json.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
